title: quotient/remainder via out-parameters
statement: From docs/specpack/semantics.md (`out` parameters, spec 04 §6.7). Define `fn divmod(a: i64, b: i64, q: out i64, r: out i64) -> unit` that assigns the quotient `a / b` to `q` and the remainder `a - (a / b) * b` to `r`. Every `out` slot must be assigned on the return path before the function returns. Define only this function.
